attributes.description: Summarised overview for Crowdstrike FDR events.

params.markdown:
## FDR overview

This dashboard summarizes Falcon Data Replicator (FDR) telemetry from the `crowdstrike.fdr` data stream. FDR ingests high-volume endpoint and network activity from CrowdStrike including process, file, DNS, authentication, and alert events.

KPI metrics show total event volume and FDR alerts. Breakdowns cover event kind, event action, and alert types. Enriched ES|QL panels resolve hostnames and usernames when transformed lookup indices has events. The map shows agent and connection geography. The alerts table lists the newest FDR alert events for triage.

embeddableConfig.title: Events over time by event kind

query.esql:
FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*" OR log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*"
| LOOKUP JOIN crowdstrike_lookup.dest_aidmaster-1 ON host.id
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY crowdstrike.info.host.hostname
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*" OR log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*"
| LOOKUP JOIN crowdstrike_lookup.dest_aidmaster-1 ON host.id
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY crowdstrike.info.host.hostname
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*" OR log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*"
| LOOKUP JOIN crowdstrike_lookup.dest_aidmaster-1 ON host.id
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY crowdstrike.info.host.hostname
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*" OR aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*"
| LOOKUP JOIN crowdstrike_lookup.dest_aidmaster-1 ON host.id
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY crowdstrike.info.host.hostname, bucket(@timestamp, 1 hour)
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| SORT `bucket(@timestamp, 1 hour)` ASC
| LIMIT 1000

FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*" OR aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*"
| LOOKUP JOIN crowdstrike_lookup.dest_aidmaster-1 ON host.id
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY crowdstrike.info.host.hostname, bucket(@timestamp, 1 hour)
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| SORT `bucket(@timestamp, 1 hour)` ASC
| LIMIT 1000

FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*" OR aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*"
| LOOKUP JOIN crowdstrike_lookup.dest_aidmaster-1 ON host.id
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY crowdstrike.info.host.hostname, bucket(@timestamp, 1 hour)
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.host.hostname IS NOT NULL
| SORT `bucket(@timestamp, 1 hour)` ASC
| LIMIT 1000

query.esql:
FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*" OR log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*"
| EVAL host_user_key = CONCAT(host.id, "::", user.id)
| LOOKUP JOIN crowdstrike_lookup.userinfo ON host_user_key
| WHERE crowdstrike.info.user.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY crowdstrike.info.user.name
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-crowdstrike.fdr-*
| WHERE aws.s3.object.key LIKE "*/data/*" OR log.file.path LIKE "*/data/*"
